item.name: Syldrion-class Insubmersible
item.description:
Unlike the craft on which it is modeled, it will break immediately upon coming into contact with water.

Use item to acquire the Syldrion-class insubmersible minion.
item.tooltip:
I'll stick to swimming, thank you very much.
   - Alisaie Leveilleur
item.specialactiondescription: Delivers an attack with a potency of 230 to all enemies within range.
